name: TONCO DEX
description: Trade and manage concentrated liquidity positions on TONCO DEX — advanced AMM with multi-asset pools on TON

tools.name: tonco_list_pools
tools.description: Discover and list TONCO liquidity pools, optionally filtered by token, sorted by TVL, volume, or APR

tools.name: tonco_get_pool_stats
tools.description: Get detailed statistics for a specific TONCO pool including reserves, price, volume, fees, and APR

tools.name: tonco_get_token_info
tools.description: Get token metadata and price information from TONCO indexer

tools.name: tonco_swap_quote
tools.description: Get a swap quote from TONCO with expected output, price impact, and minimum received after slippage

tools.name: tonco_execute_swap
tools.description: Execute a token swap on TONCO DEX — simulates first, then sends on-chain transaction

tools.name: tonco_get_positions
tools.description: List liquidity positions on TONCO for a given owner address

tools.name: tonco_get_position_fees
tools.description: Get uncollected fees for a specific TONCO liquidity position

tonco_api_key.description: Optional API key for premium TONCO endpoints
